title: Family Care Scheme (FCS) (Proximity)
text:
Family Care Scheme (FCS) (Proximity) - SupportGoWhere
Family Care Scheme (FCS) (Proximity)
Share link
Helps parents and their child(ren), married or single, to live with or near each other for mutual care and support.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Parents and their child(ren), married or single, enjoy priority access when they apply for a flat to live with or near each other
Collapse all sections
About this support

Seeks to strengthen intergenerational family support by promoting proximity living between parents and children, whether married or single.

This scheme is also applicable to fiancé/ fiancée applicants.  

Who is this for?

Married couples, singles above 35, and seniors who wish to apply for a flat to live with or near their parents/ child(ren).

This scheme is also applicable to fiancé/ fiancée applicants.

How to apply?

Obtain a HDB Flat Eligibility (HFE) letter through the HDB Flat Portal

If you meet the eligibility criteria during your flat application, you may apply for this scheme in your flat application

Where can I find help?

View more details

HDB Hotline: 6866-3066

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 22 May 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
